raw.message:
Escolha seu time e jogue no bingo mais emocionante!
Baixe agora e participe da disputa! Quem vai ser o vencedor?

hook.summary: Fast-paced bingo gameplay showing numbers being marked on multiple cards simultaneously.
hook.visual_action: Bingo cards are displayed with numbers being highlighted in blue and yellow as balls fill the bottom bar.

scene_flow: Fast-paced bingo gameplay showing multiple cards being filled as numbers are called.
A celebratory 'BINGO!' splash screen appears with a zoom effect.
Final call-to-action screen with the game logo and 'JOGUE AGORA' button over a grid of bingo cards.
audience_proxy: Casual Brazilian players who enjoy social bingo games and vibrant, tropical-themed aesthetics.
